title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Puravankara International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Puravankara International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara International Enterprises:
Puravankara International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara International Enterprises!
